title: cynoglossum bungei
intro: Cynoglossum bungei, also known as Chinese forget-me-not or Bunge's hound's tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It is commonly used in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Cynoglossum bungei is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
